subject: Add PMSH Blueprint for Frankfurt
commit_message:
Add PMSH Blueprint for Frankfurt

*Remove Policy Plugin for Franfurt due to DCAEGEN2-2136
*Remove inputs for aaf credentials
*Add default value for control_loop_name

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2128
Signed-off-by: dfarrelly <david.farrelly@est.tech>
Change-Id: Ib0c1e635657df4b3956c028d30574b07b7c52211

Patch Set 3:

On my env AAI is not fully up; when attempted to deploy PMSH got below error

root@onap2-nfs:~# kubectl logs -f -n onap dep-dcae-pmsh-77dc89cdd7-bmf4d dcae-pmsh
Failed to get data from AAI

Pls share the results of deployment/logs from your environment. Looping Jack as well to review/merge once comments are addressed as I will out tomorrow.
